script.title: David and Goliath 🗡️ | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago in ancient Israel, a giant warrior named Goliath stood nearly ten feet tall. He challenged anyone brave enough to fight him, but everyone was too afraid.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful children's storybook illustration, a massive armored giant warrior Goliath standing in a valley, shiny bronze armor glinting in sunlight, Israelite soldiers trembling in the distance, bright cheerful cartoon style, warm and whimsical

scenes.narration: A young shepherd boy named David arrived to bring food to his brothers. He was small, but his heart was full of faith in God.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of a young shepherd boy David, curly hair, simple tunic, carrying a basket of bread and cheese, gentle smile, sunny day with fluffy white sheep in the background, bright and family-friendly

scenes.narration: When David heard Goliath's booming voice mocking God, courage filled his heart. He told King Saul, I will fight the giant for God's people.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration, brave young boy David standing before King Saul in a royal tent, determined expression, the king looking surprised, warm golden lantern light, cheerful cartoon style

scenes.narration: King Saul offered David heavy armor and a sword. But David said no. He trusted God more than any weapon made by man.
scenes.image_prompt: Whimsical children's book illustration, young David gently shaking his head as King Saul offers him oversized silver armor and a large sword, kindly royal setting, bright warm colors, family-friendly

scenes.narration: David walked down to a bubbling stream and picked up five smooth stones. He placed them carefully in his shepherd's pouch and took his simple sling.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright cheerful storybook illustration of young David kneeling by a sparkling blue stream, picking up smooth round stones, green grass, gentle sunlight, peaceful wonder-filled scene

scenes.narration: Goliath laughed when he saw the small shepherd boy. But David shouted, you come with a sword, but I come in the name of the Lord.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration, tiny brave David facing enormous laughing giant Goliath in a wide valley, David pointing upward with confident faith, dramatic but family-friendly storybook style

scenes.narration: David swung his sling and let a stone fly. It struck the giant square on the forehead, and Goliath tumbled down with a great crash.
scenes.image_prompt: Whimsical storybook illustration of young David swinging a leather sling, a smooth stone flying through the air, giant Goliath beginning to fall backward, action scene, bright cheerful colors, not scary

scenes.narration: The people cheered and praised God. David showed us that no one is too small when God is on their side. Faith is mightier than any giant.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of young David celebrated by cheering Israelite crowds, children waving, golden sunset sky, warm glowing light, hopeful faith-filled scene, bright family-friendly cartoon style
